title: Turn One Product Shot Into Ads
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~18s. Featured brand: Owala (real D2C drinkware). Inspired by the @ecolab_studio reel.
concept: The inspiration is a screen-recording: a plain product photo goes into an AI tool and comes out as polished ads. For Owala, Masonry turns one ordinary bottle shot into a campaign of hero and lifestyle ads, on brand, in minutes, no studio. Same beat structure and length as the inspiration, fully original copy.
audio: Calm, modern tutorial-style track with a light spoken voice-over walking through the steps. Keystrokes and a soft generate chime can punctuate the tool beats.

beats.vo: Turn one product photo into ads.
beats.visual: A plain, flat phone snapshot of an Owala FreeSip bottle on a desk, ordinary lighting. It should look unremarkable so the payoff lands.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 0 to 1s, the turn-product-into-ads hook over a dull product shot.

beats.vo: Start with the shot you already have.
beats.visual: The same ordinary Owala photo held steady, nothing fancy about it.
The Masonry create-image screen opens, clean and ready.
The Owala image uploads into Masonry as the reference product.
A short prompt is typed: studio ad, orange splash, moody light.
The generate control with an unlimited toggle, ready to run.

beats.vo: And Masonry turns it into a campaign.
beats.visual: First polished result reveals: the Owala in a lit studio scene, premium and crisp.
A dramatic orange-accent Owala ad, condensation and punchy light.
A dark, premium Owala ad with rim light on the bottle.

beats.vo: Same bottle, on brand, every angle.
beats.visual: Three Owala ad variants sit side by side, consistent branding across all.
A clean grid of the finished Owala ads, clearly a complete campaign.

beats.vo: Comment OWALA and we will send the workflow.
beats.visual: End card: Owala wordmark with a small made-with-Masonry credit.

notes: Demo brand is Owala, a realistic stand-in for a single-hero-product D2C client (swap in the actual product when producing). All product ad variants would be generated with Masonry from one input photo; no media has been generated yet (generation is gated on separate approval). The source used a different AI tool; the integration here is Masonry. Keep total runtime near 18s to match the reference.
refsummary: The original (ecolab_studio) is a screen-recording demo: a plain product photo goes into an AI tool and comes out as polished ads, walking the literal steps (the shot you have, open the tool, drop it in, describe the ad, generate, into a campaign). Watch it for the step-by-step screen-record feel; our version follows the same steps but the tool on screen is Masonry.
story: Same step-by-step demo structure, with Owala as the demo brand. Arc: HOOK, turn one product into ads. THE BEFORE, the dull bottle shot you already have. THE STEPS, open Masonry, drop it in, describe the ad, generate. THE PAYOFF, one shot becomes a campaign: hero shot, moody dark, on brand, no studio. CTA, comment OWALA. The viewer should see exactly how a single ordinary product photo becomes a set of finished ads in minutes inside Masonry.
takeaway: One ordinary product photo, dropped into Masonry, becomes a whole campaign of on-brand hero and lifestyle ads in minutes, with no studio.
